other_observers: David Orth-Moore, Greg Mihalik, Sally Waterhouse, mob
specific_location: Frantz Lake SWA, lower pond below outhouse
description: Found by David Orth-Moore, viewed by multiple persons, photos.  Breeding plumage: white plumes on head,blue grey with purplish color on lower neck, white on face, bellly and legs.  See multiple eBird reports.  Fishing and wading.
